message:
fuse tests: record donor-fd lifecycle and capture JSON log output

Extends the FUSE ioctl test harness with machinery for verifying the
EXT4_IOC_MOVE_EXT donor-fd registration, tracing-event, and log-contract
work that landed in the previous commit. Changes are entirely dev-only.

- crates/ffs-fuse/Cargo.toml: add serde_json as a dev-dependency so
  the test harness can parse the JSON-serialized log lines emitted on
  the ffs::ioctl tracing target.

- crates/ffs-fuse/src/lib.rs (test module):
  * Add std::os::fd::AsRawFd import so the harness can turn the
    donor File handles it opens into the raw fd integers that
    dispatch_ioctl / FsOps donor-fd hooks expect.
  * Extend the IoctlCall enum with RegisterMoveExtDonor(donor_fd,
    donor_ino) and UnregisterMoveExtDonor(donor_fd) variants and
    implement them on IoctlRecordingFs so the test fixture now
    observes the full lifecycle of a MOVE_EXT call: register →
    move_ext → unregister on success, and register → unregister on
    failure.
  * Introduce SharedLogBuffer + SharedLogWriter, a Mutex-backed
    Vec<u8> writer that implements tracing_subscriber::fmt::MakeWriter.
    Pairs with a helper parse_first_json_line that reads the first
    non-empty captured log line and decodes it as serde_json::Value.
    This lets tests subscribe to the ffs::ioctl layer with
    tracing_subscriber::fmt().json() output and then assert on the
    emitted scenario_id / operation_id / outcome / error_class fields
    from the new log_move_ext_success and log_move_ext_error helpers.

- crates/ffs-harness/tests/fuse_e2e.rs: add the
  EXT4_IOC_MOVE_EXT_CMD constant (0xC028_660F) alongside the existing
  FIEMAP/GETFLAGS/SETFLAGS constants so mounted-path E2E tests for
  bd-mexte can build the ioctl command word without repeating the
  encoding by hand.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
